en.question: If a-b=3 and a+b=11, find a²-b².
If x²+y²=25 and xy=12, find x-y.
Factorize: x²-7x+12.
en.explanation: Factors of 12 sum to 7: 3 and 4. So (x-3)(x-4).

en.question: If a²+b²+c²=83 and a+b+c=15, find ab+bc+ca.
The sum of two consecutive even numbers is 42. Find them.

hi.question: दो क्रमागत सम संख्याओं का योग 42। संख्याएँ?

en.question: If x^y=y^x and x=2y, find x+y (x,y positive integers).
en.explanation: 2y^y=y^(2y). Taking log: y×ln(2y)=2y×ln(y). ln(2y)=2ln(y). 2y=y². y=2, x=4. x+y=6.
